title: Technical support that makes sense.
lead: We repair computers, laptops, consoles and peripherals. Always with a prior diagnosis and a transparent quote — we only move forward once you approve.

seo.metaTitle: Computer Repair in Fuseta, Algarve | RedDune Solutions
seo.metaDescription: Computer and laptop repair, cleaning, upgrades and custom PC builds in Fuseta and across the Algarve. Honest diagnosis and a clear quote before any work.

overview.title: From diagnosis to delivery — in record time.
overview.lead: When a device fails, you lose time, money and patience. Our mission is simple: hand back equipment working like new, in the shortest possible time, with a clear invoice and warranty included. We are based in Fuseta and cover the eastern Algarve — Olhão, Tavira, Faro and around — at the shop, at your home or by courier. We work on desktops, laptops, consoles and peripherals of any brand, and we always tell you, before touching anything, what we will do and what it costs.

items.title: Hardware and physical maintenance.
items.lead: Reference table — the final price depends on the device, number of components and complexity. We always provide a quote before starting work.

list.title: Fault diagnosis
list.description: Identification of the equipment problem. Includes a technical report and a repair quote.
list.price: 25€ · deducted if you go ahead with the repair

list.title: Basic cleaning
list.description: Cleaning of fans and heatsinks without dismantling components — through the case openings only.

list.title: Deep cleaning
list.description: Full disassembly — GPU, PSU, heatsinks. Includes high-quality thermal paste. Varies with PC size.

list.title: Chemical cleaning
list.description: Ultrasonic bath, board decontamination, thermal paste replacement (CPU, chipset, GPU) and thermal pads. Removes stubborn stains and dirt.

list.title: Component installation
list.description: RAM, SSD, graphics card and more. Includes configuration and testing of the component.

list.title: PC assembly
list.description: Physical assembly, cable management, BIOS update, OS install, drivers and stress testing. Includes XMP/EXPO profiles and fan curves on complex builds.

items.note: Extras: Rush fee (<48h) 25€ · On-site call-out 0.80€/km · Transparent quotes always shared before any work begins.

list.a: Quotes are free. The technical diagnosis (25€) is deducted from the final price if you go ahead with the repair — it only becomes a final cost if you cancel.
Yes, 30 days on all labour repairs. Parts follow the manufacturer's warranty.
Yes. The on-site call-out is charged at 0.80€/km from Fuseta.

cta.title: Ready to solve it?
cta.lead: Describe the problem on WhatsApp and you'll have a quote within 24h.
cta.primaryMessage: Hi! I came from the Technical Support page.
